subject: Q3 Budget Report - Action Required by Friday
body:
Hi,

Please review the attached Q3 budget report and send your department's approval by Friday EOD. This is blocking the finance team's monthly close.

Regards,
Sarah

subject: Your Amazon order has shipped!
body: Your order #112-3456789 has shipped and will arrive by Thursday. Track your package at amazon.com/orders.

subject: Re: Project Falcon - Integration deadline
body:
Hi team,

Just a reminder that the API integration for Project Falcon must be completed by October 20th. Please flag any blockers ASAP. Client is watching closely.

Thanks,
Mike

subject: Weekly Newsletter - Tech Digest #45
body: This week in tech: OpenAI announces new model, Google releases Android 15, and Apple faces EU antitrust probe. Read more at techdigest.io. To unsubscribe click here.

subject: Server is DOWN - Immediate attention needed
body: URGENT: Production server prod-us-east-1 is not responding. Users are getting 503 errors. DevOps team please investigate immediately. This has been ongoing for 15 minutes.

subject: Team lunch this Friday at 12:30
body:
Hey everyone,

Just a heads up — we're doing a team lunch this Friday at Nando's at 12:30pm. Let me know if you can make it by replying to this email!

Cheers,
Rachel

subject: Your invoice INV-2024-089 is due
body:
Dear Customer,

This is a reminder that invoice INV-2024-089 for $2,340 is due on October 20, 2024. Please arrange payment via bank transfer or visit our portal.

Regards,
Accounts Team

subject: Performance review scheduled for Oct 22
body:
Hi,

Your annual performance review has been scheduled for October 22 at 2:00 PM with your manager. Please prepare a self-assessment form beforehand.

HR Team

subject: 50% OFF - Flash Sale ends tonight!
body: Don't miss our BIGGEST sale of the year! 50% off everything storewide. Use code FLASH50 at checkout. Sale ends at midnight tonight! Unsubscribe from promotional emails here.

subject: Follow-up: Proposal for cloud migration
body:
Hi,

Following our call last week, I've attached the revised cloud migration proposal. Could you review it and share feedback by Wednesday? We'd like to kick off in November.

Best,
David

subject: GitHub PR #234 needs your review
body:
Hey,

Could you review PR #234 (auth-service refactor)? It's been open for 3 days and is blocking the sprint. Only needs a quick look.

Thanks,
Alex

subject: LinkedIn: 5 new connection requests
body: You have 5 new connection requests on LinkedIn. Log in to review and respond to them.

subject: Critical security patch - deploy by EOD
body:
Hi team,

A critical CVE has been identified in our auth library. Security team has prepared a patch (v2.3.1). All environments must be updated by end of day today. Please confirm once done.

Security Team

subject: Webinar: Future of AI in Enterprise - Tomorrow 3PM
body: You are registered for tomorrow's webinar: Future of AI in Enterprise. Join link: zoom.us/j/123456. Duration: 90 minutes. Add to calendar.

subject: Monthly subscription renewal - Notion
body: Your Notion Pro subscription renews on October 18, 2024 for $16/month. No action needed unless you wish to cancel before the renewal date.

subject: Contract extension - please sign by Oct 18
body:
Hi,

Please find attached the contract extension for the upcoming project phase. It requires your signature by October 18. Use the DocuSign link below to sign.

Legal Team

subject: Your flight to Mumbai is confirmed
body: Booking confirmed: IndiGo 6E-204, Delhi to Mumbai, Oct 19 at 07:20. PNR: ABC123. Web check-in opens 48 hours before departure at goindigo.in.

subject: Feedback needed: new dashboard design
body:
Hi,

The design team has mocked up a new analytics dashboard. We'd love your feedback before finalizing. Figma link is attached. Please respond with comments by Friday.

UX Team

subject: Password reset request
body: We received a request to reset the password for your account. If you made this request, click the link below within 1 hour. If you did not request this, ignore this email.

subject: Interview invite: Senior Engineer role at TechCorp
body:
Hi,

We reviewed your profile and would like to invite you for a technical interview for the Senior Engineer position. Please let us know your availability for next week so we can schedule.

Recruiting Team, TechCorp
